title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Roadmap Planning — 5 Skills for Quarterly Planning and Priority Alignment
description: For product managers and heads of engineering, this pack builds opportunity sizing summaries, prioritization scoring matrices, now-next-later roadmap narratives, dependency mapping notes, and board-level roadmap presentations so they can move from chaotic feature lists to a defensible, stakeholder-approved plan
gumroad_description:
Your roadmap is a disconnected list of features, not a strategy that stakeholders actually buy into.

This pack fixes that. Five Claude AI skills that transform raw ideas into defensible quarterly plans with dependency maps, prioritization frameworks, and board-ready narratives—all in the time it takes to write one status email.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Product managers tired of re-explaining the same priorities to engineering every sprint
— Heads of engineering building roadmaps that don't collapse under stakeholder pressure
— Anyone who's had a perfectly good plan rejected because it wasn't documented right

WHAT'S INSIDE

— Opportunity Sizing Summaries: Turn loose ideas into comparable impact projections
— Prioritization Scoring Matrices: Make tradeoff decisions stick with numbers
— Now-Next-Later Narratives: Build roadmap stories that land with executives
— Dependency Mapping Notes: Surface hidden risks before they derail your timeline
— Board-Level Presentations: Templates that turn your plan into something investors believe in

Five ready-to-use .md skill files. Drop straight into your Claude skills folder.

Stop defending bad roadmaps. Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
